MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT ReturnOrder_Home__dll.AccountId__c AS AccountId__c, 'USD' AS CurrencyCode__c, count(ReturnOrder_Home__dll.Id__c) AS ReturnCount__c, sum(TRY_CONVERT_CURRENCY(ReturnOrder_Home__dll.Refund_Amount_c__c, 'USD', 'USD')) AS RefundAmount__c, max(ReturnOrder_Home__dll.CreatedDate__c) AS LastReturnDate__c FROM ReturnOrder_Home__dll GROUP BY ReturnOrder_Home__dll.AccountId__c, 'USD'
